paper_title: Parameters as Experts: Adapting Vision Models with Dynamic Parameter Routing

approaches_discussed.name: Prompt-based tuning
approaches_discussed.description: Inserts learnable tokens into input sequence of Vision Transformers

identified_challenges.name: Representation deficiency
identified_challenges.description: Adapters use input-agnostic low-rank modeling which limits feature representation capacity for complex tasks

identified_challenges.name: Feature redundancy
identified_challenges.description: Lack of cross-layer interaction leads to redundant representations across network layers

proposed_solution.name: AdaRoute
proposed_solution.description: Dynamic parameter routing approach for vision model adaptation

title: Parameters as Experts: Adapting Vision Models with Dynamic Parameter Routing
